description: Client-side instrumentation helpers for Microsoft Clarity.

novel_features.name: Snippet renderer
novel_features.description: Render a complete Clarity tracking snippet for a project ID, plus focused snippets for every documented client API call.

novel_features.name: Local HTML audit
novel_features.description: Inspect an HTML file for a Clarity tag script, masking attributes, and common window.clarity client API calls.

catalog_description: Generate Microsoft Clarity tracking snippets and audit local HTML for tag install, masking attributes, and client API calls.
